title: Workflow documentation created with AI
excerpt:
Description
AI writing and documentation assistant for analyzing workflows and board automations and then writing a one sheet on the processes of the board or workflow. 
What are you trying to achieve
It would be awesome…

posts.author: BenATawardco (Benjamin Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

AI writing and documentation assistant for analyzing workflows and board automations and then writing a one sheet on the processes of the board or workflow.

What are you trying to achieve

It would be awesome to be able to build a workflow and then have AI generate a training document based on the workflow that I built. This would greatly help save me time and energy as I am not just doing the builds for my company but also then writing up the documentation and holding trainings with different teams. By having AI write the documentation based on the workflow or board automations it would give me great insight into the structure of the more complex processes and help me train not just the teams using them but the employees who may need to step into my shoes and maintain them if I am not here.

posts.author: Devavella (Devavella)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve tried something similar by pasting my workflow steps into a doc and then running it through an AI to simplify or format it better for different teams. Worked pretty well.

posts.author: Devavella (Devavella)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve been turning my workflows into clearer docs by first using AI for the rough outline, then running it through humanizerai.com to make everything sound more natural and easy to follow. It helps clean up the robotic tone so people actually want to read the docs. This has saved me a bunch of editing time when handing off processes to others.
